_comment: Pinned cross-language HMAC vector for the image privacy proxy. Source of truth computed with: printf '%s' "<e>:<A>" | openssl dgst -sha256 -hmac "<K>" -binary | openssl base64 | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '='. Asserted byte-for-byte by BOTH proxy-worker/test/crypto.test.js (Worker, crypto.subtle) and MMailTests/ImageProxyTests.swift (CryptoKit). K is ASCII-printable so its UTF-8 bytes are unambiguous on every side. A deliberately contains a space and an '&' to exercise RFC-3986 percent-encoding (space -> %20, not '+').
